---
output: github_document
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-"
)
```

# njord

Parametric windstorm trigger design and basis risk quantification for UK/European
windstorm, using ERA5/Copernicus CDS gust-speed data.

## installation

```{r, eval = FALSE}
# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("awkward-crow/njord")
```
